text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm READING! It's a book about<n>how to get
faster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And what an excellent book it is! Just<n>reading it
makes me want to break<n>into a full-speed dash!
choice_data_list: Can I borrow it when you're done?

Could you run for me so I can study your
technique?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sure! In fact, you can borrow it right<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've already absorbed all its secrets,<n>just by
reading the table of contents!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I borrow the book from Sakura<n>Bakushin O and
proceed to read it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Ohhh! You want to use meas an example?! YOU SURE CAN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Practice makes perfect, and you can't<n>have
perfect without Bakushin! Come,<n>feast your eyes
on my mighty<n>Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to get a few pointers by<n>watching
Sakura Bakushin O run.
